title: Understanding Bull vs Bear Markets
points: Bear markets signify a 20% drop from recent highs.
content: The stock market is a complex ecosystem of buyers and sellers. | When confidence is high, we enter a Bull phase where prices trend upward. | This is often driven by strong economic data and high employment. | Conversely, a Bear market creates a cycle of fear and selling. | Long-term investors often see Bear markets as buying opportunities.

title: The Rise of Artificial Intelligence
points: Machine learning is a subset of AI.
Ethics in AI remains a hot topic.
content: AI is no longer just a sci-fi concept. | It is integrated into our phones, cars, and homes. | Companies are investing billions into generative models. | This shift requires new skills for the modern worker.
